title: Best Multispecialty Hospital in Bangalore | Axon Hospital, Pain Specialist
description: Axon Specialty Hospital (Pain Specialist) is a Multispecialty Hospital in Bangalore dedicated to provide affordable and quality health care.
text: Best Multispecialty Hospital in Bangalore | Axon Hospital, Pain Specialist Home About Us Our Doctors Our Facilities Services Axon Care Blogs Contact Us Select Page Healing hands belongs to us Don’t worry, we got your back. Cashless Facility Our hospital is tied up with many insurance companies that give you a hassle-free cashless hospitalization. Clear your hospital bills directly through the insurance company. Intensive Care Units All the departments are equipped with the finest diagnostic and therapeutic equipment. The hospital has separate Intensive Care Units for each department for post operative care like Medical ICU, Pediatric ICU, Neuro Surgical ICU ,Intermediate Care ICU Operation Theatres The O.Ts are equipped with state-of-the-art equipment like C-arms, operating microscopes, blood gas analysers, thermoelastrograph, anaesthesia machines, Cuza machines for GI/Transplant/Neuro etc., ultracisors, etc. Emergency Care Emergency may happen anytime. And that’s why we (best spine specialist in Indiranagar, Bangalore) are there all the time. Nurses, physicians, and other emergency health specialists in our Emergency Departments provide 24×7 care to people who are severely ill or have suffered life-threatening injuries. The Intensivists are available 24X7 in house specialists give back up round the clock. Laboratory Department of Laboratory at Axon Speciality Hospital is accredited lab which provides 24/7 diagnostic services, with a primary focus – ‘patients come first’, by facilitating clinician-sin early diagnosis and treatment. Axon hospital Laboratory has a dedicated team comprising of doctors, trained technical and support staff. Cosmetology & Plastic Surgery Axon Speciality Hospital (best cosmetology clinic in Indiranagar, Bangalore) is at the forefront of plastic surgery and reconstructive surgery. A complete array of surgical and non-surgical cosmetic surgery treatments is available at Axon best hospital in Indiranagar Bangalore india facility, including facial rejuvenation, Hair transplant, body contouring, breast augmentation and reduction. Our Team of Doctors Meet our group of certified and experienced Pain Management Specialist Doctors Dr. Praveen M Orthopedics – MBBS, MS 21 Years experience in joint replacement surgery, fracture and trauma surgeries. Primary and revision Hip replacement. Septic & Aseptic revision surgeries. Minimally invasive knee replacement. Dr. Amar P MBBS, MD, EDRA 17 Years experience in chief anesthesiologist and critical care & pain management. Dr. Suman U S Paediatric Neurologist , MD 18 Years experience in child specialist and Paediatric neurologist . View All our Doctors Our Departments Every department is equipped to assure the best quality health care service as the best Multispeciality Hospital in Indiranagar Bangalore Orthopedic Axon Hospital is the Best Ortho hospital in Indiranagar Bangalore. We have trained surgeons the team is headed by Dr. Praveen M specializing in various sub-specialties of Orthopedics including Joint Replacement and Minimally Invasive Orthopedic Procedures. Our experts treat a wide range of musculoskeletal conditions to relieve pain and improve mobility for patients.  We treat all types of fractures and dislocation 24X7 including accident (MLC) cases. Anaesthesiology At Axon Speciality Hospital, we have a team of well-trained anesthesiologists the team is headed by Dr. Amar P who can cater to the surgical demands of different surgical specialties ranging from the simple to the complex ones. Our Operation Theaters have state-of-the-art Anesthesia work stations, patient monitoring devices, and other equipment which enable us to administer anesthesia in a safe manner to all patients. Spine Surgery Axon Speciality Hospital is the Best Spine Specialist in Indiranagar Bangalore. We provide comprehensive treatment options for spinal ailments like Disc bulge/ Prolepses Spinal Trauma, Degenerative Spine Diseases, Spine listhesis, Spine Instrumental, Spinal Instability, Spinal Deformity(  Spinscoliosis and kyphosis)  Spinal Stenosis, and Spinal Tumours. We offer key-hole spine surgery so that our young patients can get back to work at the earliest. Read More About Axon Speciality Hospital Axon Speciality hospital was started in the year 2009 and has been serving people successfully in and around Indiranagar from last 12 years under the leadership of Dr. Praveen M and Dr.Amar P. Axon Speciality hospital has played a major role by serving people during the time of Dengue, H1N1 outbreak and also handled the situation very professionally. During  the time of pandemic corona Axon has served the community with high zeal providing oxygen and all other medical facilities to the needy. Axon has been instrumental by vaccinating people with Covishield and Covaxin. Axon Speciality Hospital is a multispeciality hospital in Indiranagar Bangalore dedicated to provide affordable and quality health care to patients. Our team of empathetic doctors and medical staff ensure each patient receives timely attention and right medical care in the most professional and ethical manner. Our specialists are highly qualified and well experienced who offer recommendations considering the best interest of the patient. We believe in making your concerns ours. Our 24 hour human, medical, and infrastructural services ensure your constant comfort and quick recovery.  We make sure that from the minute you walk in through our doors; you are not just treated but cared for. We offer you a shoulder to lean on and an ear to talk to. Success for us is the smile on our patients faces as they leave our hospital.
